title: French Smoky Stew
description: A hearty, comforting French stew made with smoky sausage and fragrant fennel.

ingredients.name: kenyian spices
ingredients.notes: Smoked paprika and chili powder blend

instructions: In a large Dutch oven, cook the smoky bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon and set aside. Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned.
Add the sliced fennel and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped potatoes, diced vegetables, and kenyian spices.
Stir to combine, then add the browned bacon back into the pot.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, then check the stew and add more seasoning if needed.
Return the stew to the oven and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs.
